scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend
